title: Cleanup the leftovers in `play kube` e2e test used for ginkgo focus option
body:
This PR removes some leftovers in `play kube` e2e tests used for ginkgo `focus` option  

Signed-off-by: Cosmin Tupangiu <cosmin@redhat.com>


```release-note
None
```
